This page is protected to prevent harmful edits. Contact an administrator if you want to suggest changes to the page.

If you think this page should be unprotected, then use {{unprotect}} on the talk page.

Preferred by most knights. They generally have a higher attack Value than defence value, but most knights have a shield with better defense value then their main weapon.

Charged Axe Weapons and Enchanted Axe Weapons could be made until Summer Update 2017. They were later merged into their respective base weapons which had become imbuable.

  • Axe Weapons
  • Enchanted Axe Replicas
  • Charged Axe Replicas

Weapon Lvl Atk Def Def Mod. Hands Resist. Imb. Slots Class. Weight Attributes Dropped By

Replicas of Enchanted Weapons can be bought from Cillia on Sundays for 500 gp each. All enchanted weapon replicas have no level requirement, elemental attack, defence modifier, resistance, imbuement slot nor skill boost. Moreover, all of them are in classification group one. They were implemented on Summer Update 2017.

Name Atk Def Hands Class. Weight Dropped By
Earth Barbaric Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 51.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Earth Headchopper Replica 5 5 Two 1 45.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Earth Heroic Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 61.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Earth Knight Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 59.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Earth War Axe Replica 5 5 Two 1 61.50
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Energy Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 51.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Energy Headchopper Replica 5 5 Two 1 45.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Energy Heroic Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 61.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Energy Knight Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 59.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Energy War Axe Replica 5 5 Two 1 61.50
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Fiery Barbarian Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 51.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Fiery Headchopper Replica 5 5 Two 1 45.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.

  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.

  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Fiery War Axe Replica 5 5 Two 1 61.50

Icy Headchopper Replica 5 5 Two 1 45.00

Icy Heroic Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 61.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Icy Knight Axe Replica 5 5 One 1 59.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Icy War Axe Replica 5 5 Two 1 61.50
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.

Replicas of Charged Weapons can be bought from Cillia on Sundays for 500 gp each. All charged weapon replicas have no level requirement, resistance, skill boost, imbuement slot nor any other column that has been omitted on the table below. Moreover, all of them are in classification group one. They were implemented on Summer Update 2017.

Name Atk Def Hands Class. Weight Dropped By
Ornate Carving Axe 5 5 One 1 50.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
Ornate Carving Chopper 5 5 Two 1 70.00
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.

  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
